name: scan-security
description: Run a security scan. Uses bandit (Python), npm audit (Node), govulncheck (Go), cargo audit (Rust). Falls back to grep-based credential scan if no framework tool available. Read-only.

scope.description: Advisory hint: if provided, the calling agent should pass this as the target path to the framework scanner directly (e.g. bandit -r path/). The default invocation scans the entire project.

args: if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then python -m bandit -r . 2>/dev/null || echo '[security] Install bandit: pip install bandit'; elif [ -f package.json ]; then npm audit; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then govulncheck ./... 2>/dev/null || go vet ./...; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo audit 2>/dev/null || cargo check; else grep -rn --include='*.py' --include='*.js' --include='*.ts' --include='*.go' -E '(password|secret|api_key|token)\s*=\s*["'\'']{1}[^"'\'']{8,}' . 2>/dev/null | grep -v '.git' | grep -v 'test' || echo 'No obvious hardcoded secrets found.'; fi
